notes:
## v0.5.3 - Exact Match Fix & Image Snippet Support

### Bug Fixes
- **Exact Match Only**: Strict mode now uses `input == keyword` (no word boundary). Loose mode uses `ends_with` only (no word boundary check). Mirrors original Beeftext behavior.
- **Image Snippets Now Supported**: Image-only snippets can be triggered. Previously filtered out from trigger cache.
- **Cache Bug Investigation**: Reviewed trigger caching system — invalidate_cache() is called on all snippet CRUD operations. No obvious stale cache issues found.
